title: 9 Inch Round Disposable Bagasse Disposable Bagasse, Biodegradable, Sugarcane Paper Plates, for Serving Snacks & Dinner Disposable Plates (Pack of 50)
features: BIODEGRADABLE MATERIAL: Made from natural bagasse (sugarcane fibre), these plates are naturally biodegradable and compostable
PACK QUANTITY: Set includes 50 round plates, perfect for parties, events, or everyday use
PLATE DIMENSIONS: Each round plate measures 23 centimetres (9 inches) in diameter, ideal for serving main courses or snacks
STURDY CONSTRUCTION: Strong and reliable plates that can hold both hot and cold foods without leaking or bending
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for serving various types of food including main courses, appetisers, desserts, and party snacks
description: 🌿 Eco-Friendly Biodegradable Disposable Plates – Strong, Safe & Sustainable 🍽️♻️ Make every meal more meaningful with our premium-quality biodegradable disposable plates – the perfect combination of convenience and care for the environment! Whether it’s a party, a picnic, or daily family use, these plates are designed to handle it all — hot, cold, wet, or dry food — all while being planet-friendly 🌍💚. 🌟 Product Highlights: ✅ 100% Biodegradable & Compostable ♻️ Crafted from natural plant-based materials like sugarcane bagasse or other eco-pulp, these plates are fully compostable at home or in industrial facilities. ✅ Microwave & Freezer Safe ❄️🔥 Heat your food without worry — these plates are microwave-safe and durable enough for freezer storage too. ✅ Leak-Proof & Durable 💪 Sturdy construction ensures the plate won’t bend, tear, or leak — even with oily or saucy foods like curry, pasta, or gravies. ✅ Food-Grade & Chemical-Free 🚫 No plastic, no wax, no bleach — just pure, clean, food-safe material that’s good for you and better for the Earth 🌎🍃. ✅ Elegant Yet Disposable ✨ Simple, clean white finish that suits weddings, birthdays, pujas, office lunches, food stalls , or eco-conscious events. ✅ Space-Saving Stackable Design 🧺 Easily stack and store — perfect for home use, catering, or large-scale functions. 📦 Product Specifications: Material: Natural Plant Fibber / Sugarcane Bagasse Colour: Clean White Diameter: ~10 Inches (customizable) Quantity: Pack of 50 / 100 / 150 (based on your listing) Microwave-Safe: ✅ Freezer-Safe: ✅ Home Compostable: ✅ Plastic-Free: ✅ Oil & Water Resistant: ✅ 🛒 Perfect For: 🎉 Birthday Parties 💼 Corporate Events 👰 Weddings & Engagements 🌱 Eco-Friendly Homes 🛕 Religious Functions & Bhogs 🍱 Takeaway Food Services 🍽️ Daily Family Meals ✅ Go green, live clean — upgrade from plastic and foam to a better, biodegradable alternative that looks great, performs well, and leaves no waste behind. 🌍💫 👉 Add to Cart now and make your celebrations sustainable! 🛍️🌱
